case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION vs. LEWIS, DAVID DBA GAME DON'T STOP DISTRIBUTION

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DAVID DBA GAME DON'T STOP DISTRIBUTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, DAVID DBA GAME DON'T STOP DISTRIBUTION $2,435.23 PRINCIPAL, $155.20 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,691.43 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION SERVED JAN-25-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DAVID DBA GAME DON'T STOP DISTRIBUTION
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 3/7/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
